daily.today_energy: Your magnetic pull is stronger than usual—people are drawn to your authenticity. Channel this into meaningful connections rather than surface-level vibes. Trust your instincts; they're basically cosmic GPS right now.
daily.love: Whether single or coupled, vulnerability is your superpower today. Someone's noticing the real you beneath the mysterious exterior. Let them see it. The connection deepens when you stop performing and just exist.
daily.career: Your work energy is shifting toward collaboration over solo domination. That idea you've been sitting on? Someone else might elevate it. Stay open to partnership—your impact multiplies when you're not trying to control everything.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding today. Movement that centers you (not just cardio) hits different. Hydrate more than you think you need to. That restless feeling? Channel it into stretching or a walk rather than scrolling.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to get real with yourself about what you actually want. Mercury's moving in a way that makes those hard conversations feel less terrifying, so lean into that clarity. Trust the shift.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or single, there's something about vulnerability that's suddenly magnetic rn. If you've been holding back, this is your gentle nudge to say what's been on your mind. Real recognizes real.
weekly.career: Your ideas hit different this week—seriously consider pitching that thing you've been sitting on. There's supportive energy around taking up more space professionally. Your instincts about direction are basically spot on.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest disguised as movement. Think yoga, long walks, or whatever feels nourishing rather than punishing. Hydration and sleep are genuinely your power moves this week.
